top3.sql:
SELECT id
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 AND hasNonFoil = 1
AND (cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL OR cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL)
AND id IN (
    SELECT c1.id
    FROM cards c1
    JOIN cards c2 ON c1.faceName = c2.faceName OR c1.id = c2.cardKingdomFoilId OR c1.id = c2.cardKingdomId
    WHERE c1.hasFoil = 1 AND c2.hasNonFoil = 1
    AND c1.id != c2.id
)

SELECT c.id
FROM cards c
WHERE c.hasFoil = 1
  AND c.hasNonFoil = 1
  AND c.id IN (
    SELECT c2.id
    FROM cards c2
    WHERE c2.hasFoil = 0
      AND c2.hasNonFoil = 1
      AND c2.id != c.id
      AND (
        c2.faceName LIKE '%' || c.faceName || '%'
        OR c.faceName LIKE '%' || c2.faceName || '%'
        OR c2.name LIKE '%' || c.name || '%'
        OR c.name LIKE '%' || c2.name || '%'
      )
  );

final.sql:
SELECT id
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 AND hasNonFoil = 1
AND (cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL OR cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL)
AND id IN (
    SELECT c1.id
    FROM cards c1
    JOIN cards c2 ON c1.faceName = c2.faceName OR c1.id = c2.cardKingdomFoilId OR c1.id = c2.cardKingdomId
    WHERE c1.hasFoil = 1 AND c2.hasNonFoil = 1
    AND c1.id != c2.id
)
